description: Catálogo público de experiencias reservables. Tarifas visibles con selector de moneda.

services.name: Producto de prueba PayPal
services.description: Producto de prueba para validar el flujo de pago. Visible solo para la agencia autorizada.
services.notIncluded: No corresponde a un servicio turístico real.
services.description_en: Test product to validate the payment flow. Visible only to the authorized agency.
services.notIncluded_en: This is not a real travel service.

services.name: Bienvenida Ancestral Cusco
services.description: Recorrido panorámico por los principales puntos de Cusco, con una parada especial en la parte alta de la ciudad para vivir una bienvenida ancestral y pedir buenos augurios durante tu visita.
includes: Visita al Mirador del Cristo Blanco
services.description_en: Panoramic route through Cusco’s main highlights, including a special stop in the upper part of the city for an ancestral welcome ceremony and good wishes for your stay.

services.name: City Tour Cusco y centros arqueológicos
services.description: Visita guiada por el templo del Coricancha y los centros arqueológicos más importantes alrededor de Cusco: Saqsaywaman, Qenqo, Puca Pucara y Tambomachay.
includes: Visita a Coricancha y centros arqueológicos
services.notIncluded: No incluye ingresos: Coricancha S/ 15 y boleto turístico parcial según nacionalidad.

entryTickets.name: Boleto turístico parcial
entryTickets.note: Circuito centros arqueológicos. Referencia extranjero; peruano S/ 40.
entryTickets.note_en: Archaeological sites circuit. Foreigner reference rate; Peruvian S/ 40.

services.name_en: Cusco City Tour and Archaeological Sites
services.description_en: Guided visit to the Coricancha temple and the most important archaeological sites around Cusco: Saqsaywaman, Qenqo, Puca Pucara and Tambomachay.
services.notIncluded_en: Entrance tickets not included: Coricancha S/ 15 and partial tourist ticket according to nationality.

services.name: Valle Sagrado Full Day
services.description: Ruta clásica por el Valle Sagrado visitando Pisac, mercado artesanal, centro arqueológico, Urubamba, Ollantaytambo y Chinchero en modalidad full day.
includes: Retorno a Cusco en full day
services.notIncluded: No incluye boleto turístico parcial circuito 2: S/ 40 nacional o S/ 70 extranjero.
services.description_en: Classic Sacred Valley route visiting Pisac, the artisan market, the archaeological site, Urubamba, Ollantaytambo and Chinchero in full-day mode.
services.notIncluded_en: Partial tourist ticket circuit 2 not included: S/ 40 for nationals or S/ 70 for foreigners.

services.name: Valle Sagrado conexión a Machu Picchu
services.description: Visita Pisac, mercado artesanal, centro arqueológico, Urubamba y Ollantaytambo. Ideal para conectar con tren hacia Machu Picchu desde Ollantaytambo.
services.notIncluded: No incluye boleto turístico parcial circuito 2: S/ 40 nacional o S/ 70 extranjero.
services.name_en: Sacred Valley Connection to Machu Picchu
services.description_en: Visit Pisac, the artisan market, the archaeological site, Urubamba and Ollantaytambo. Ideal for connecting with the train to Machu Picchu from Ollantaytambo.
services.notIncluded_en: Partial tourist ticket circuit 2 not included: S/ 40 for nationals or S/ 70 for foreigners.

services.name: Valle Sagrado VIP Full Day
services.description: Ruta ampliada por Chinchero, Maras, Moray, Urubamba, Ollantaytambo, Pisac centro arqueológico y mercado artesanal.
includes: Retorno a Cusco en full day
services.notIncluded: No incluye boleto turístico parcial ni ingreso a Maras: S/ 15 nacional o S/ 20 extranjero.
services.description_en: Extended route through Chinchero, Maras, Moray, Urubamba, Ollantaytambo, Pisac archaeological site and artisan market.
services.notIncluded_en: Partial tourist ticket and Maras entrance not included: S/ 15 for nationals or S/ 20 for foreigners.

services.name: Valle Sagrado VIP conexión a Machu Picchu
services.description: Inicia por Chinchero, continúa por Maras, Moray y Urubamba, finalizando en Ollantaytambo para conectar con tren a Machu Picchu.
services.notIncluded: No incluye boleto turístico parcial ni ingreso a Maras: S/ 15 nacional o S/ 20 extranjero.
services.name_en: Sacred Valley VIP Connection to Machu Picchu
services.description_en: Starts in Chinchero, continues through Maras, Moray and Urubamba, ending in Ollantaytambo to connect with the train to Machu Picchu.
services.notIncluded_en: Partial tourist ticket and Maras entrance not included: S/ 15 for nationals or S/ 20 for foreigners.

services.name: Maras y Moray
services.description: Excursión de medio día hacia Moray y las salineras de Maras, dos paisajes emblemáticos del Valle Sagrado.
services.notIncluded: No incluye ingreso a Maras ni boleto turístico para Moray.
services.description_en: Half-day excursion to Moray and the Maras salt mines, two emblematic landscapes of the Sacred Valley.
services.notIncluded_en: Maras entrance and tourist ticket for Moray not included.

services.name: Valle Sur Cusco
services.description: Visita Tipón, Piquillacta y los atractivos principales del Valle Sur de Cusco en una ruta cómoda de medio día.
services.description_en: Visit Tipón, Piquillacta and the main attractions of Cusco’s South Valley on a comfortable half-day route.

services.name: Montaña de Colores
services.description: Tour de aventura hacia Vinicunca, una de las rutas naturales más famosas de Cusco, con caminata de altura y paisajes andinos.
includes: Desayuno y almuerzo básico según operación
services.notIncluded: No incluye ingreso: S/ 20 nacional o S/ 25 extranjero.
services.description_en: Adventure tour to Vinicunca, one of Cusco’s most famous natural routes, with a high-altitude hike and Andean landscapes.
services.notIncluded_en: Entrance ticket not included: S/ 20 for nationals or S/ 25 for foreigners.

services.name: Laguna Humantay
services.description: Caminata hacia la laguna Humantay, rodeada de montañas y paisajes altoandinos, ideal para viajeros que buscan naturaleza y aventura.
includes: Desayuno y almuerzo básico según operación
services.notIncluded: No incluye ingreso: S/ 20 nacional o S/ 25 extranjero.
services.description_en: Hike to Humantay Lake, surrounded by mountains and high-Andean landscapes, ideal for travelers looking for nature and adventure.
services.notIncluded_en: Entrance ticket not included: S/ 20 for nationals or S/ 25 for foreigners.

services.name: Siete Lagunas de Ausangate
services.description: Ruta de trekking por el entorno del Ausangate y sus lagunas altoandinas. Recomendada para viajeros con buena condición física.
includes: Desayuno y almuerzo básico según operación
services.description_en: Trekking route through the Ausangate area and its high-Andean lakes. Recommended for travelers with good physical condition.

services.name: Guiado Machu Picchu Circuito 2
services.description: Servicio guiado en grupo para recorrer Machu Picchu por el Circuito 2, una de las rutas más completas para conocer la ciudadela.
services.notIncluded: No incluye entrada a Machu Picchu, tren ni bus Consettur.
services.description_en: Shared guided service to visit Machu Picchu through Circuit 2, one of the most complete routes to explore the citadel.
services.notIncluded_en: Machu Picchu entrance, train and Consettur bus not included.

services.name: Guiado privado Machu Picchu Circuitos 1 o 3
services.description: Servicio guiado privado para Circuito 1 o Circuito 3. Ideal para grupos pequeños que desean mayor flexibilidad dentro del horario confirmado.
services.notIncluded: No incluye entrada a Machu Picchu, tren ni bus Consettur.
services.name_en: Private Machu Picchu Guide Circuits 1 or 3
services.description_en: Private guided service for Circuit 1 or Circuit 3. Ideal for small groups looking for greater flexibility within the confirmed schedule.
services.notIncluded_en: Machu Picchu entrance, train and Consettur bus not included.

services.name: Machu Picchu Full Day para extranjeros
services.description: Experiencia de un día a Machu Picchu para pasajeros extranjeros, incluyendo traslados, tren Inca Rail, bus Consettur, ingreso oficial y guía.
includes: Traslado ida y retorno a la estación
Ticket de tren Inca Rail ida y vuelta
services.notIncluded: No incluye alimentación ni servicios no mencionados.
services.name_en: Machu Picchu Full Day for Foreign Travelers
services.frequency_en: Daily departure subject to ticket availability
services.description_en: One-day Machu Picchu experience for foreign passengers, including transfers, Inca Rail train, Consettur bus, official entrance and guide.
services.notIncluded_en: Meals and services not mentioned are not included.

services.name: Machu Picchu Overnight para extranjeros
services.description: Programa de 2 días y 1 noche con tren, bus, ingreso, hotel 3 estrellas, desayuno del hotel y guía en Machu Picchu.
includes: Ticket de tren Inca Rail ida y vuelta
services.notIncluded: Tarifa calculada en base a habitación doble, mínimo 2 personas. Si viaja 1 persona, consultar suplemento.
services.name_en: Machu Picchu Overnight for Foreign Travelers
services.frequency_en: Daily departure subject to ticket availability
services.description_en: 2-day, 1-night program with train, bus, entrance ticket, 3-star hotel, hotel breakfast and guide in Machu Picchu.
services.notIncluded_en: Rate based on double room, minimum 2 travelers. If traveling alone, please request supplement.

services.name: Machu Picchu Full Day para peruanos
services.description: Full Day Machu Picchu para pasajeros peruanos. Incluye todo el servicio excepto el ticket de tren, que se cotiza aparte como tren turístico o tren local.
includes: Traslado ida y retorno a la estación
services.notIncluded: No incluye ticket de tren. Tren turístico o tren local se cotiza aparte.
services.name_en: Machu Picchu Full Day for Peruvian Travelers
services.frequency_en: Daily departure subject to ticket availability
services.description_en: Machu Picchu Full Day for Peruvian passengers. Includes the full service except the train ticket, which is quoted separately as tourist or local train.
services.notIncluded_en: Train ticket not included. Tourist or local train is quoted separately.

services.name: Machu Picchu Overnight para peruanos
services.description: Programa de 2 días y 1 noche para pasajeros peruanos, incluyendo ingreso, bus, hotel 3 estrellas, desayuno del hotel y guía. No incluye tren.
services.notIncluded: No incluye ticket de tren. Tarifa calculada en base a habitación doble, mínimo 2 personas. Si viaja 1 persona, consultar suplemento.
services.name_en: Machu Picchu Overnight for Peruvian Travelers
services.frequency_en: Daily departure subject to ticket availability
services.description_en: 2-day, 1-night program for Peruvian passengers, including entrance ticket, bus, 3-star hotel, hotel breakfast and guide. Train not included.
services.notIncluded_en: Train ticket not included. Rate based on double room, minimum 2 travelers. If traveling alone, please request supplement.
